ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year when the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the survey */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey */,
  "survey_category" TEXT /* Category of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this group belongs to */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group (e.g., department, role) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the demographic group */,
  "demographic_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each demographic group */,
  "demographic_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the demographic groups should be displayed */,
  "demographic_type" TEXT /* Category of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this response is associated with */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group this response reflects */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question this response is for */,
  "strongly_agree" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who strongly agree */,
  "somewhat_agree" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who somewhat agree */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are neutral */,
  "somewhat_disagree" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who somewhat disagree */,
  "strongly_disagree" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who strongly disagree */,
  "dont_know" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who don't know */,
  "not_applicable" REAL /* Percentage of respondents for whom the question is not applicable */,
  "positive_answers" REAL /* Percentage of positive answers */,
  "negative_answers" REAL /* Percentage of negative answers */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Actual response text for open-ended questions */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended, Likert scale) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the questions should be displayed */,
  "question_required" INTEGER /* Whether the question is required or optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, HR, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is an admin */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the admin can administer */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., super admin, survey admin, report viewer) */,
  "admin_status" TEXT /* Status of the admin (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_admins_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this result is tied to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the survey results */,
  "positive_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of positive responses */,
  "negative_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of negative responses */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., overall, demographic-specific) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this feedback corresponds to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this summary is based on */,
  "total_positive" INTEGER /* Total number of positive responses */,
  "total_negative" INTEGER /* Total number of negative responses */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses captured */,
  "summary_type" TEXT /* Type of the summary (e.g., overall, demographic-specific) */,
  "summary_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_summary_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
